para_trans: Distribution of funds to Municipal Councils
For Palus Municipal Council, Dist. Sangli under heading Account (2217 1301) for the year 2025-26
Government Corrective Note No: - NABARD 2025 / Q. No.225 (2) / NAB-16 (E-1341219)
(1) Department of Urban Development, Government Decision No: - NABARD 2025 / P.No.225 (2) / NABARD-16,
Municipal councils in the state are given special grants for "specialty" works. under reference
No. (1) The executive mechanism of the work in the Government Decision herein is "Public rather than" Municipal Council. "
The Department of Construction will remain.
2. Reference No. (1) The other terms and conditions of the Government decision herein shall continue.
This government certificate is issued by the Government of Maharashtra under www.maharashtra.gov.in.
